message:
fix: pipeline nil check, persona name validation, atomic state writes

- pipeline.go: Fix nil pointer dereference when finalState is nil in error case
- persona.go: Add name validation regex (a-z, A-Z, 0-9, _, -)
- state.go: Refactor to use util.AtomicWriteFile for cleaner atomic writes
